messages.content: Bugs Bunny (Canon, Composite) vs. Shaggy (1% Power)

Shaggy (0.00001% Power) vs. Goku

At 0.00001% power level, Shaggy would have virtually no strength and would be significantly weaker than any normal human. In this scenario, it would be no contest if Shaggy were to fight against Goku. 

Goku is one of the most powerful characters in the Dragon Ball franchise with incredible strength, speed, and abilities like the Kamehameha and the Spirit Bomb. His power levels are in the billions and he's able to destroy planets and take on foes much stronger than himself. 

Even with Goku holding back his power or limiting his abilities to match Shaggy's weak strength, he would still be able to defeat Shaggy with ease. So, goku would easily win with no contest in a fight against Shaggy at 0.00001% power.
Shaggy (1% Power) vs. Goku

At 1% power, Shaggy would still be incredibly weak compared to Goku's abilities and power levels. While Shaggy's physical abilities would be enhanced from his base form, he would still not come close to the strength, speed, and power of Goku.

Shaggy's own combat abilities would be difficult to utilize against an opponent as skilled as Goku, and his physical strength would not be enough to stand up against Goku's attacks.

In a fight against Shaggy at 30% power, it would be a tough and close battle between the two. However, Goku's experience, combat skills, and power levels give him a substantial advantage over Shaggy, increasing the likelihood of Goku winning the fight.
